Custom Dentures in Greer, SC

[/vc_column_text][vc_column_text el_class=”medium-p”]Dentures are removable appliances that replace missing teeth. The modern dentures we fabricate at Poinsett Dental Associates have natural-looking false teeth and a gum-colored base made of plastic resin. Our dentists custom design the appliance so it fits your mouth just right. Once in place, your dentures will restore the appearance of your smile and help you chew, eat and speak properly.[/vc_column_text][/vc_column][vc_column column_padding=”no-extra-padding” column_border_style=”solid”][vc_column_text css=”.vc_custom_1677267795445{padding-bottom: 3% !important;}”]

Types of Dentures

When you visit Poinsett Dental Associates for treatment, we’ll help you decide on the best type of dentures for your lifestyle, budget and needs. Options include:

  • Temporary dentures
  • Removable partial dentures
  • Conventional full dentures
  • Implant-supported overdentures
[/vc_column_text][vc_column_text]

The Process of Getting Dentures

Our team will take accurate measurements and impressions of your mouth. The dentist will then work with a dental lab to create custom partials or full dentures.

Usually, you’ll wear temporary dentures first to ensure you love the appearance and fit. The dentist will see if any changes to the size, color or shape are needed. When your final partial or complete dentures are ready, you’ll try them on, we’ll make adjustments if necessary and you’ll leave the office with a functional, stunning smile.
